tool.name: topx
tool.description: Filters a gene count matrix, selecting the most relevant genes by variance (using edgeR) or by total count.
tool.command: mkdir -p /data && #for $element in $data_collection: ln -s '$element' "/data/${element.element_identifier}" && #end for Rscript /bin/top.R $matrixname $format $separator $logged $threshold $type > '$output_log' 2>&1 && tar -chzf data_archive.tar.gz -C /data . && true

param.name: threshold
param.label: Threshold for selecting top genes (typically between 10 and 2000 depending on dataset size)

param.name: separator
param.label: File separator (use "," for CSV, "\t" for TSV)

param.name: logged
param.label: Indicates whether the count matrix values are already log-transformed (TRUE) or not (FALSE).

param.name: data_collection
param.label: Path to the folder containing input data and receiving output results
